summary: Executed end-to-end backend + mobile UI validation for demo login, inbox load, AI assistant response, stories feed, reels feed, and core APIs. Backend core endpoint regression passed fully; UI flows passed with one observed flaky delay on spotlight panel load in automation.

integration_issues.issue: Spotlight panel showed prolonged loading in 2 runs (12s timeout) before stabilizing in diagnostic run (loaded by ~25s).

action_items: Investigate and optimize initial spotlight/reels load time on mobile navigation transitions.
Add data-testid attributes to remaining interactive controls in LeftPanel/ChatView/Reels/Stories for stable automation coverage.
Refactor oversized backend/server.py into smaller modules to improve maintainability and reviewability.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is 1300+ lines and should be split (auth, conversations, feeds, assistant, socket).
FRONTEND_URL still has localhost default fallback in backend; environment-only config is safer for production parity.
Many interactive frontend controls still lack data-testid, reducing deterministic test automation reliability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Used credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Preview URL tested: https://app-check-deploy-1.preview.emergentagent.com/login. Backend core endpoints passed via pytest. Mobile UI validated for demo login, chat load, AI assistant response, stories load, and reels load (reels had transient loading delay in automation).
rca of the issue: Reels automation timeout was caused by transient delayed render state after tab switch (loading screen persisted beyond 12s in two runs). Diagnostic run with longer wait confirmed /api/reels returns 200 and reels panel does render, indicating performance/timing flakiness rather than hard API failure.
